diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 import torch

 import torch.nn as nn

 

-class DKT_Target_Features_Ext5(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.5):

+class DKT_Target_Features_Ext6(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.4):

         super().__init__()

         self.num_skills = num_skills

         self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

@@ -10,8 +10,8 @@
         self.attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 32)

         self.correct_attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 32)

         self.total_correct_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 32)

-        self.total_attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 32)

         self.recency_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 32)

+        self.recency_correct_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 32)

         

         self.cont_proj = nn.Linear(5, 32)

         

@@ -27,34 +27,32 @@
         )

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

         

-    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency, next_skills, next_attempts, next_correct_attempts, next_total_corrects, next_recency):

+    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency, recency_correct, next_skills, next_attempts, next_correct_attempts, next_total_corrects, next_recency, next_recency_correct):

         s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)

         c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)

-        

-        total_attempts = torch.arange(skill_ids.size(1), device=skill_ids.device).unsqueeze(0).expand_as(skill_ids)

         

         attempts_c = torch.clamp(attempts, 0, 4999)

         correct_attempts_c = torch.clamp(correct_attempts, 0, 4999)

         total_corrects_c = torch.clamp(total_corrects, 0, 4999)

-        total_attempts_c = torch.clamp(total_attempts, 0, 4999)

         recency_c = torch.clamp(recency, 0, 4999)

+        recency_correct_c = torch.clamp(recency_correct, 0, 4999)

         

         a_emb = self.attempt_emb(attempts_c)

         ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(correct_attempts_c)

         tc_emb = self.total_correct_emb(total_corrects_c)

-        ta_emb = self.total_attempt_emb(total_attempts_c)

         r_emb = self.recency_emb(recency_c)

+        rc_emb = self.recency_correct_emb(recency_correct_c)

         

         cont_feats = torch.stack([

             attempts.float() / 10.0,

             correct_attempts.float() / 10.0,

             total_corrects.float() / 10.0,

-            total_attempts.float() / 10.0,

-            recency.float() / 10.0

+            recency.float() / 10.0,

+            recency_correct.float() / 10.0

         ], dim=-1)

         cont_emb = self.cont_proj(cont_feats)

         

-        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb, a_emb, ca_emb, tc_emb, ta_emb, r_emb, cont_emb], dim=-1)

+        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb, a_emb, ca_emb, tc_emb, r_emb, rc_emb, cont_emb], dim=-1)

         x = self.dropout(x)

         

         h, _ = self.gru(x)

@@ -62,29 +60,27 @@
         

         next_s_emb = self.target_skill_emb(next_skills)

         

-        next_total_attempts = total_attempts + 1

-        

         next_attempts_c = torch.clamp(next_attempts, 0, 4999)

         next_correct_attempts_c = torch.clamp(next_correct_attempts, 0, 4999)

         next_total_corrects_c = torch.clamp(next_total_corrects, 0, 4999)

-        next_total_attempts_c = torch.clamp(next_total_attempts, 0, 4999)

         next_recency_c = torch.clamp(next_recency, 0, 4999)

+        next_recency_correct_c = torch.clamp(next_recency_correct, 0, 4999)

         

         next_a_emb = self.attempt_emb(next_attempts_c)

         next_ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(next_correct_attempts_c)

         next_tc_emb = self.total_correct_emb(next_total_corrects_c)

-        next_ta_emb = self.total_attempt_emb(next_total_attempts_c)

         next_r_emb = self.recency_emb(next_recency_c)

+        next_rc_emb = self.recency_correct_emb(next_recency_correct_c)

         

         next_cont_feats = torch.stack([

             next_attempts.float() / 10.0,

             next_correct_attempts.float() / 10.0,

             next_total_corrects.float() / 10.0,

-            next_total_attempts.float() / 10.0,

-            next_recency.float() / 10.0

+            next_recency.float() / 10.0,

+            next_recency_correct.float() / 10.0

         ], dim=-1)

         next_cont_emb = self.cont_proj(next_cont_feats)

         

-        out_in = torch.cat([h, next_s_emb, next_a_emb, next_ca_emb, next_tc_emb, next_ta_emb, next_r_emb, next_cont_emb], dim=-1)

+        out_in = torch.cat([h, next_s_emb, next_a_emb, next_ca_emb, next_tc_emb, next_r_emb, next_rc_emb, next_cont_emb], dim=-1)

         logits = self.out(out_in).squeeze(-1)

         return logits

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 import torch

 import argparse

 

-from model import DKT_Target_Features_Ext5

+from model import DKT_Target_Features_Ext6

 

 def precompute_features_ext(skills, corrects, num_skills):

     B, T = skills.shape

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@
     correct_attempts = torch.zeros_like(skills)

     total_corrects = torch.zeros_like(skills)

     recency = torch.zeros_like(skills)

+    recency_correct = torch.zeros_like(skills)

     

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

     

@@ -39,18 +40,33 @@
         total_corrects[i:i+chunk_size] = cum_total_corrects.cpu()

         

         last_attempt_step = torch.zeros(s_chunk.shape[0], num_skills, dtype=torch.long, device=device)

+        last_correct_step = torch.zeros(s_chunk.shape[0], num_skills, dtype=torch.long, device=device)

+        

         recency_chunk = torch.zeros_like(s_chunk)

+        recency_correct_chunk = torch.zeros_like(s_chunk)

+        

         for t in range(T):

             s_t = s_chunk[:, t]

+            c_t = c_chunk[:, t]

+            

             last_step = torch.gather(last_attempt_step, 1, s_t.unsqueeze(1)).squeeze(1)

             is_first = (attempts_chunk[:, t] == 0)

             rec = torch.where(is_first, torch.zeros_like(last_step), t - last_step)

             recency_chunk[:, t] = rec

             last_attempt_step.scatter_(1, s_t.unsqueeze(1), t)

             

+            last_c_step = torch.gather(last_correct_step, 1, s_t.unsqueeze(1)).squeeze(1)

+            is_first_c = (correct_attempts_chunk[:, t] == 0)

+            rec_c = torch.where(is_first_c, torch.zeros_like(last_c_step), t - last_c_step)

+            recency_correct_chunk[:, t] = rec_c

+            

+            new_last_c_step = torch.where(c_t == 1, t, last_c_step)

+            last_correct_step.scatter_(1, s_t.unsqueeze(1), new_last_c_step)

+            

         recency[i:i+chunk_size] = recency_chunk.cpu()

+        recency_correct[i:i+chunk_size] = recency_correct_chunk.cpu()

         

-    return attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency

+    return attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency, recency_correct

 

 def main():

     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()

@@ -66,17 +82,17 @@

     num_skills = checkpoint['num_skills']

-    model_type = checkpoint.get('model_type', 'DKT_Target_Features_Ext5')

+    model_type = checkpoint.get('model_type', 'DKT_Target_Features_Ext6')

     embed_dim = checkpoint.get('embed_dim', 256)

     hidden_dim = checkpoint.get('hidden_dim', 256)

     num_layers = checkpoint.get('num_layers', 1)

-    dropout = checkpoint.get('dropout', 0.5)

+    dropout = checkpoint.get('dropout', 0.4)

     

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

     

-    attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency = precompute_features_ext(skills, corrects, num_skills)

+    attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency, recency_correct = precompute_features_ext(skills, corrects, num_skills)

     

-    model = DKT_Target_Features_Ext5(num_skills, embed_dim=embed_dim, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, dropout=dropout)

+    model = DKT_Target_Features_Ext6(num_skills, embed_dim=embed_dim, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, dropout=dropout)

     

     model.load_state_dict(checkpoint['model_state_dict'])

     model.to(device)

             in_total_corrects = b_total_corrects[:, :-1]

             next_total_corrects = b_total_corrects[:, 1:]

             next_recency = b_recency[:, 1:]

+            next_recency_correct = b_recency_correct[:, 1:]

             

-            logits = model(in_skills, in_corrects, in_attempts, in_correct_attempts, in_total_corrects, in_recency,

-                           next_skills, next_attempts, next_correct_attempts, next_total_corrects, next_recency)

             probs = torch.sigmoid(logits)
